creator: root@kdpu.frk.kr.ua
text:
When using mount_null, the kernel panic ocurred when opening
files in the mounted directory.

Kernel says:

Fatal trap 18: integer devide fault while in kernel module
...
current process = ftpd
...

Fix: 

Not known.
How-To-Repeat: 
        To reproduce the problem need to be mount_null to some directory
and open files in it (by direct acces, ftp or http).
